channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Star Citizen has raised $1 billion, remains in early access after nine years
item.description: Single-player spin-off Squadron 42 is "in the closing stages" but doesn't have a release date either.

item.title: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
item.description: Memorial Day is here, meaning the seasonal sales are in full swing. If your plans over the long weekend involve pool parties or barbecues, now is a great time to pick up a portable speaker or set of solar lights, as many of our favorite models are currently on sale. You can also find deals […]

item.title: Une barre de son signée Sony à moins de 100 € ? C’est possible grâce à cette offre Amazon
item.description: Amazon baisse le prix de la Sony HTSF150 à 99 euros seulement, contre 119 euros de base. L'occasion de profiter d'une barre de son compacte compatible avec les TV, mais aussi avec les smartphones grâce à son mode Musique.

item.title: Tether will launch an 'official' stablecoin in Georgia tied to local currency
item.description: The new cryptocurrency will be called GELT and will represent the Georgian Lari.

item.title: The pope’s AI encyclical isn’t really about AI
item.description: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to diagnose older problems: concentrated power, eroding democracy, and a tech elite that shapes the world to its own advantage.

item.title: Pope Leo calls for being ‘profoundly human’ in the age of AI
item.description: Pope Leo XIV warned of the risks of AI and unconstrained technological power in his first major papal document released on Monday. Magnifica Humanitas is the pope's manifesto on "safeguarding the human person in the time of artificial intelligence," in which he discusses the dangers of AI-powered warfare, the effects of AI on labor, and […]

item.title: GitHub hit with another major attack — Megalodon hits over 5,000 repos with malware-laden commits
item.description: A TeamPCP copycat was just spotted hitting thousands of GitHub repos with an infostealer.

item.title: Amazons Memorial Day sale is live — score the best deals on TVs, Bose earbuds, Jackery power stations, and more
item.description: The best Amazon Memorial Day deals take over 50% off TVs, Bose earbuds, Jackery portable power stations, and more.

item.title: iOS 27 : Apple va laisser Google Cast remplacer AirPlay en Europe
item.description: Le Digital Markets Act continue de grignoter l'écosystème Apple brique par brique. Cette fois, c'est le casting vidéo qui y passe.

item.title: The pitch trick that helped an eSports startup raise $20M when VCs only wanted AI
item.description: Earlier this year, Lucra Sports founder and CEO Dylan Robbins did something that no one else has ever done. And he shared several secrets on how he did it.

item.title: Quels smartphones utilisent les patrons de Nvidia et de Tesla ? Elon Musk et Jensen Huang ont fait le choix de… la normalité
item.description: Abondamment photographiés lors de leur déplacement en Chine à bord d'Air Force One, Jensen Huang et Elon Musk utilisent des smartphones coûteux mais étonnamment communs... bien moins flamboyants en tout cas que leurs propriétaires.

item.title: Last chance to shop 60+ of the best Memorial Day deals: We found TVs, mattresses, headphones, and more on sale
item.description: Memorial Day sales end tonight. Shop last-chance deals from Bose, Sony, Ruggable, TCL, Shark, Ninja, and so many more.

item.title: Megalodon cyberattack infects 5,500 GitHub open-source repositories with malware, researchers say
item.description: The Megalodon cyberattack affected more than 5,500 GitHub open-source repositories, a type of attack GitHub warned against in April 2026.

item.title: Un VPN très apprécié des cybercriminels démantelé lors d’une vaste opération internationale
item.description: Il faisait sa publicité sur les forums de hackers en leur garantissant un anonymat total, mais les autorités ont mis fin à son activité.

item.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close in days: Apply before May 27
item.description: The deadline to apply or nominate for Startup Battlefield 200 is May 27. This is your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100,000. Apply now.

item.title: Digital spring cleaning is now a frontline defense in the scam economy
item.description: Does your digital life need a spring clean? Chances are, it does...

item.title: Krispy Kreme data breach settlement deadline approaches. Claim $75 to $3,500.
item.description: Those affected by a 2024 Krispy Kreme data breach are eligible for a class action payout, but the deadline is fast approaching.

item.title: 50,000 California residents are waiting to see if officials can keep this chemical tank from exploding
item.description: Governor Newsom declared a state of emergency following the evacuation of Garden Grove residents, in Southern California. A damaged chemical tank in Southern California cracked over the weekend, which authorities were hopeful would relieve pressure and reduce the risk of an explosion.Some 50,000 residents in Garden Grove, a city of roughly 170,000 about 40 miles (60 kilometers) south of downtown Los Angeles, have been evacuated and are waiting for a resolution. The tank overheated Thursday and began venting vapors, leaving local and state officials scrambling to evade a worst possible scenario...

item.title: Save up to $350 on the best 3D printers in the Memorial Day sale — massive price cuts on Bambu Lab, Elegoo, Creality, and Anycubic 3D printers including the 'exceptionally good' Centauri Carbon 2 and our top budget pick for beginners
item.description: I've picked out the best Memorial Day 3D printer deals for beginners, hobbyists, and small business owners.

item.title: Marcher à nouveau sur la Lune : ces différents défis qui attendent SpaceX en 2026
item.description: Derrière les images spectaculaires des récents vols test se cache une réalité bien plus complexe : avant de poser le pied sur la Lune, il faudra d'abord résoudre une série de défis techniques aussi discrets que décisifs. Des défis dont dépend, au fond, l'avenir entier du programme...

item.title: 5 days left: Save up to $410 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 passes before prices increase
item.description: Early Bird savings for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 in San Francisco end May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now to save up to $410 before prices increase.

item.title: The death of the deep dive — why Google’s new AI search wants to do your thinking for you
item.description: Google’s new AI search tools promise to save time, but they may also reshape how we think, explore and navigate the internet.

item.title: La dernière mise à jour de la Pixel Watch casse l’une de ses fonctions les plus pratiques
item.description: Vous avez l'habitude de faire sonner votre smartphone depuis votre poignet avant de partir au travail ? Si vous possédez une Pixel Watch récente, cette petite routine risque d'être compromise. Un récent déploiement logiciel a mystérieusement désactivé la fonction de localisation du téléphone, provoquant au passage de sérieux bugs sur l'application mobile. ...
